name: Natural Gas / LNG
summary: Day 63 Thursday. CHENIERE LNG +2.7% TO $272.23 (TTF €44.13/MWh STABLE + QATAR 17% OFFLINE PERSISTS = US LNG EXPORT-ARB AT ALL-TIME-HIGH SPREADS); HH $2.64/MMBtu +3.0% 1D ON US LNG EXPORT PULL. Cheniere is the cleanest pure-play of the US LNG export-arb thesis. Brent at $120 + TTF at €44.13 = US LNG export-arb at all-time-high spreads. HH +3.0% 1D non-crisis driven (US LNG export pull continues; cold-snap residual). TTF surprisingly decoupled from Brent +12-15% 1M (TTF -19.8% 1M) — drivers: storage adequate going into spring, US LNG supply firm, mild weather. UAE OPEC exit takes effect TOMORROW May 1 — primary impact is oil not gas. Structural drivers persist: Hormuz functionally closed Day 62; Qatar Ras Laffan Trains 4/6 (12.8 mtpa, ~17% Qatar LNG) still 3-5yr recovery; partial North restart within 1 month, South late summer. Sadara JV shutdown (June 15 grace expiry). Asian LNG imports at 6-year low reduces European cargo competition. PRIOR DAY-1 SUMMARY (preserved): Brent gapped -4.6% to $100.47 on Sunday Globex / Monday Asia open — Branch 3 (positioning) defeats Branch 1 (structural break) and Branch 2 (theatrical band). Friday close: HH $2.69/MMBtu (+6.8% 1D — storage build slowdown + cold-front + LNG export demand, NOT crisis-driven, ~10% crisis attribution); TTF €44.86/MWh Apr 24 last (+0.8% 1D Friday, +5% 1W, +44% pre-crisis); Cheniere LNG $257.09 (flat 1D Friday, -9.6% 1M, +24.8% 3M). Branch 3 likely tests Cheniere $250-255 area Monday on European-energy-emergency premium compression (-1 to -2% as Branch 3 widens; the diplomatic-breakdown LONG thesis from yesterday is RETIRED). [TRUNCATED — needs re-synthesis]

recent_signals.headline: BRANCH 3 → CHENIERE EUROPEAN-ENERGY-EMERGENCY PREMIUM COMPRESSION; HH +6.8% NON-CRISIS

historical_summaries.summary: 4 signals. QatarEnergy halted LNG production at Ras Laffan (world's largest LNG facility, ~20% of global supply) after attacks | Iranian missiles damaged LNG Trains 4 & 6 at Ras Laffan | European TTF surged 70% in March to EUR54
18 signals. Eurozone inflation surged to 2 | CONFIRMED: European TTF gas at EUR 47 | CONFIRMED: Heating oil +3
